title: Add AI-generated dish images to menu

requirements.summary: Generate AI images for all menu dishes and save them as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/
acceptanceCriteria: Every dish in menuData.ts has a corresponding AI-generated image saved in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Each image is visually appropriate for the dish it represents
Images follow a consistent artistic style suitable for a premium Chettinad restaurant

file_operations.description: Generate AI image: Jigarthanda — a chilled South Indian drink with sarsaparilla syrup, almond gum, reduced milk, and ice cream in a tall glass, top-down shot on dark stone surface
Generate AI image: Vanilla Ice Cream — two scoops of creamy vanilla ice cream in a ceramic bowl with wafer, warm moody lighting on dark background
Generate AI image: Chettinad Chicken Curry — rich dark brown spiced chicken curry in a clay pot with curry leaves and red chilies, rustic wooden surface
Generate AI image: Mutton Kola Urundai — golden fried minced mutton balls on a banana leaf with mint chutney, close-up shot
Generate AI image: Prawn Masala — vibrant orange-red spiced prawns in a cast iron skillet with coriander garnish, dark moody lighting
Generate AI image: Paneer Tikka — charcoal-grilled paneer cubes with bell peppers on skewers, light smoke wisps, dark background
Generate AI image: Chettinad Fish Curry — deep red fish curry with whole spices in a terracotta bowl, banana leaf underneath
Generate AI image: Biryani — aromatic saffron-layered Chettinad biryani in a copper handi with fried onions and boiled egg
Generate AI image: Parotta — flaky layered South Indian parotta stacked on a banana leaf, golden brown, dark atmospheric background
Generate AI image: Rasam — thin golden-red tomato rasam in a small brass tumbler with curry leaves, steam rising
Generate AI image: Sambar — thick lentil and vegetable sambar in a clay bowl with drumstick pieces visible
Generate AI image: Curd Rice — creamy curd rice topped with pomegranate seeds and curry leaf tempering in a white ceramic bowl

requirements.summary: Update menuData.ts to reference all newly generated dish images from frontend/public/assets/generated/
acceptanceCriteria: All dish entries in menuData.ts reference valid image paths pointing to the generated images
No broken image links remain in the menu data
The DishCard component renders the correct image for each dish on the Menu page

file_operations.description: Replace all existing placeholder or missing image references in the menuItems array with paths to the newly generated dish images. For each dish that matches a generated image (Jigarthanda, Vanilla Ice Cream, Chettinad Chicken Curry, Mutton Kola Urundai, Prawn Masala, Paneer Tikka, Chettinad Fish Curry, Biryani, Parotta, Rasam, Sambar, Curd Rice), update the image property to point to the corresponding file in /assets/generated/ (e.g., '/assets/generated/jigarthanda.dim_400x400.png'). Ensure all dishes have valid image paths that will load correctly in the DishCard component on the Menu page.

requirements.summary: Update SignatureDishes.tsx to use newly generated dish images for all four hardcoded signature dishes
acceptanceCriteria: Each signature dish card on the Home page displays the correct AI-generated image
Images load without errors and display correctly within the card layout

file_operations.description: Replace the image references for all four hardcoded signature dishes with paths to the newly generated dish images from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Match each signature dish to its corresponding generated image (e.g., if a signature dish is Chettinad Chicken Curry, use '/assets/generated/chettinad-chicken-curry.dim_400x400.png'). Ensure the images load correctly and display properly within the existing card layout on the Home page.
